price: O mein Volk, gewiß, ich fürchte für euch den Tag des gegenseitigen Zurufens,
arabic: وَيَٰقَوۡمِ إِنِّيٓ أَخَافُ عَلَيۡكُمۡ يَوۡمَ ٱلتَّنَادِ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: wayāqawmi innī akhāfu ʿalaykum yawma al-tanādi
